subcodes.first_line: The heart and the eye have truly attained felicity through the perusal of thy letter, which was adorned with the ornament of remembrance and praise, and embellished with the mention of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز القلب و العین بزیاره کتاب حضرتک الذی کان مطرزا بطراز الذکر و الثنا و مزینا بذکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @wisdom [hikmat], @transcendence; unknowability of God
